# Helin Silver (和林银业)
> B2B Silver Trading — LBMA Compliant · Hong Kong Based · Global Delivery

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://www.helinsilver.com/): Premium B2B silver trading platform. LBMA-compliant 99.99% silver bars, grains, and powder for wholesale buyers. Hong Kong and Shenzhen offices.
- [Products](https://www.helinsilver.com/products/): Silver bars (15kg Standard Good Delivery Bar), silver grains (99.99%), silver powder (99.9%). Full spec tables with pricing tiers, minimum order quantities.
- [About Us](https://www.helinsilver.com/about/): 15+ years in precious metals, 500+ tons traded, 8+ countries served. LBMA standards, SGS/CCIC certified.
- [Contact](https://www.helinsilver.com/contact/): Hong Kong and Shenzhen offices. WhatsApp, email, phone. Japanese and English speaking account managers.

## Blog
- [Hong Kong Silver Export Guide](https://www.helinsilver.com/blog/hong-kong-silver-export-guide.html): Complete guide to exporting silver from Hong Kong — regulations, logistics, documentation, and best practices for international buyers.
- [US Silver Import Guide](https://www.helinsilver.com/blog/us-silver-import-guide.html): US silver import regulations, duty rates, customs clearance process for Hong Kong-origin silver shipments.
- [Silver Price Outlook 2026](https://www.helinsilver.com/blog/silver-price-outlook-2026.html): 2026 silver price forecast and market analysis — supply/demand dynamics, industrial demand, investment trends.
